url.description: The base URL of your Miniflux instance (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:8080).

apiToken.description: Your Miniflux API Key (create in Settings > API Keys).

ignoreTlsErrors.description: Allow this plugin to connect to Miniflux even when TLS certificate validation fails.

limit.description: Default number of unread articles to display per category. Maximum 100.

refreshMinutes.description: Status refresh interval in minutes. Minimum 1.

uiAutoRefresh.description: Enable auto-refreshing the articles in the browser.

uiAutoRefreshInterval.description: Browser auto-refresh interval in seconds. Minimum 10.

showCategories.label: Show categories
showCategories.description: User display preference also available from the Miniflux plugin header.
